activeShape: explicit translation-object rows with unverified NRSV base, KJV/NABRE ordinary lanes, and DRB ordinary/addition lanes

ordinaryKJV.scope: Ordinary Esther 1-10 only, including source-address rows Esther 8:13-17.

ordinaryNABRE.scope: Ordinary Esther 1-10 only, including source-address rows Esther 8:13-17.

ordinaryAndAdditionDRB.scope: Ordinary Esther rows plus DRB mapped addition lanes A-F under source-address policy.

activeNRSV.scope: All active Greek Esther NRSV text, including named additions A-F and ordinary rows.
activeNRSV.reason: No approved independent NRSV/NRSVA source witness is bound. Existing active text was preserved as explicit NRSV lane text but not source-verified.

fullGreekEstherAllLanes.reason: Greek Esther cannot be fully trusted while active NRSV text remains unverified against an approved source witness.

allowedClaims: Greek Esther KJV ordinary lanes are exact-source-collated for Esther 1-10, including source-address rows 8:13-17.
Greek Esther NABRE ordinary lanes are exact-source-collated for Esther 1-10, including source-address rows 8:13-17.
Greek Esther DRB ordinary and mapped addition lanes are exact-source-collated under source-address policy.
Greek Esther NRSV active text is preserved but not source-verified.
forbiddenClaims: Greek Esther is fully trusted across all lanes.
BibleGateway Greek Esther candidate is a bound NRSV source witness.
KJV or NABRE provide named Greek Esther addition lanes.
knownAbsences: NRSV absent at Esther 8:13-17 pending approved source witness.
KJV absent from named additions A-F because the bound KJV source covers ordinary Esther only.
NABRE absent from named additions A-F because the bound NABRE source covers ordinary Esther only.
DRB Esther 15:1-3 source-present but inactive under current Addition D policy.
nextRequiredWork: Acquire or bind approved NRSV/NRSVA source witness for Greek Esther before NRSV trust.
Acquire or approve NRSV source witnesses for Greek Daniel additions before Greek Daniel full trust.
Keep non-Protestant canon status partial until remaining NRSV source blocks are resolved or explicitly governed.
